steps: Go to https://platform.stability.ai and log in or create an account (sign up with Google for 25 free credits)
Click your profile icon in the top-right corner of the dashboard
The page opens on the 'API Keys' view by default
Click the '+' icon to generate a new API key
Copy the generated API key and store it securely

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Stability AI API key. Sent as 'Bearer {key}' in the Authorization header.

notes: New accounts receive 25 free credits on signup (Google sign-in)
Image generation costs credits: ~0.065 credits for Core, ~0.8 for Ultra per image
Up to 10 active API keys per account
Free tier credits expire; purchase additional credits as needed
Responses can be returned as image/png directly or base64-encoded JSON depending on Accept header

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve account information including available credits
